title: 4 - 🏛️ Organization Copilot Leading Indicators [Edu]
description: Organization-level Copilot leading indicators focused on API-only fields (pull-request activity and Copilot code review engagement) that are NOT shown in the built-in Copilot Usage dashboard at /orgs/<org>/insights/copilot/usage.

list.name: organization_id
list.label: Organization
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT organization_id FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY organization_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT organization_id FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY organization_id

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE('Live: ' || (SELECT value FROM app_config WHERE key = 'org') || '/' || (SELECT value FROM app_config WHERE key = 'repo'), 'Not yet synced') AS "Data Source"

options.content:
# 🏛️ Organization Copilot Leading Indicators

## Why leading indicators?

The [GitHub Engineering System Success Playbook (ESSP)](https://github.com/resources/insights/engineering-system-success-playbook) recommends balancing **leading** and **lagging** indicators — and pairing each lagging metric with a companion leading metric — to drive engineering system improvements ([ESSP e-book, p. *Leading versus lagging metrics*](https://assets.ctfassets.net/wfutmusr1t3h/59IWCIRvx0KfHbh6B7bv62/d9f55b94ab43fe91e9ed183d73882954/2025-05-28-GitHub-ESSP-Ebook-EZ-Version012.pdf)):

- **Lagging indicators** — outcomes measured *after* work is completed (e.g., deployment frequency, mean time to recovery). Important for long-term results, but gains take time to be realized.
- **Leading indicators** — signals close to the source of friction that *predict* downstream outcomes. For example, improvements in code-review time alongside developer confidence in code review can signal future improvements in deployment speed and quality.

> *"To truly measure progress, it's important to complement each of the 12 engineering success metrics with leading indicators that reflect the team's day-to-day coding activities and the points of friction to be addressed, allowing for proactive adjustments."* — GitHub ESSP

The SPACE **Communication & Collaboration** domain (code review, PR throughput, review engagement) is a key source of leading indicators when those are your friction points.

## What this dashboard shows

This dashboard surfaces **organization-scoped, API-only Copilot metrics** that act as leading indicators for the lagging DORA metrics on the other dashboards in this stack. They are intentionally **complementary to** — not duplicative of — the built-in Copilot Usage dashboard at `https://github.com/orgs/<org>/insights/copilot/usage?period=28d` (which already covers DAU/WAU/MAU, lines added/deleted, completions suggested/accepted, and language/IDE breakdowns).

Fields are sourced from [Copilot usage metrics → Pull request activity fields (API only)](https://docs.github.com/en/copilot/reference/copilot-usage-metrics/copilot-usage-metrics#pull-request-activity-fields-api-only) plus the API-only Copilot code-review engagement fields. Each comparison section shows the organization-wide total, the Copilot-attributed count, and a percentage — so you can see both *volume* and *share* at a glance, with a daily time-series to reveal trends the 28-day rollups can hide.

| Leading indicator (this dashboard) | Lagging metric it informs |
|---|---|
| PRs created / created by Copilot, daily trend | Deployment frequency, change volume |
| PRs reviewed / reviewed by Copilot | Lead time for changes, review throughput |
| Active vs passive code-review engagement | Review quality, developer confidence |
| Median minutes to merge — all vs Copilot-authored | Lead time for changes |
| Copilot suggestion apply rate | Review effectiveness, change failure rate |

panels.title: PRs Created (28d)
panels.description: Source: Copilot Metrics Reports API → `day_totals[].monthly_active_users` | Table: `copilot_organization_daily`

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM((pull_requests->>'total_created')::int) AS value FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days' FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')

panels.title: PRs Created by Copilot (28d)
panels.description: pull_requests.total_created_by_copilot summed over the last 28 days.

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM((pull_requests->>'total_created_by_copilot')::int) AS value FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days' FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')

panels.title: % Created by Copilot
panels.description: Share of PRs created by Copilot vs total PRs created in the last 28 days.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM((pull_requests->>'total_created_by_copilot')::int) / NULLIF(SUM((pull_requests->>'total_created')::int), 0), 1) AS value FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days' FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')

panels.title: PRs Created — Daily (Total vs Copilot)
panels.description: Daily trend of total PRs created vs PRs created by Copilot. Reveals adoption ramp over time.

targets.rawSql: SELECT day AS time, (pull_requests->>'total_created')::int AS "Total Created", (pull_requests->>'total_created_by_copilot')::int AS "Created by Copilot" FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days' FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id') ORDER BY day

options.content:
**API source:** `pull_requests.total_created` and `pull_requests.total_created_by_copilot` from the org `Copilot usage metrics` API (28-day report).

**Calculation:**
- Stat panels sum each field across the last 28 days.
- Percent gauge: `SUM(total_created_by_copilot) / NULLIF(SUM(total_created), 0) * 100`.

**SQL pattern:**
```sql
SELECT (pull_requests->>'total_created')::int FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id'
```

**Why time-series:** The 28-day total hides whether Copilot-authored PR creation is *trending up* (adoption working) or *flat* (rollout stalled). The daily trend is the primary signal for measuring Copilot Coding Agent adoption.

---

### Underlying SQL

**PRs Created (28d)**

```sql
SELECT SUM((pull_requests->>'total_created')::int) AS value
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days'
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')
```

**PRs Created by Copilot (28d)**

```sql
SELECT SUM((pull_requests->>'total_created_by_copilot')::int) AS value
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days'
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')
```

**% Created by Copilot**

```sql
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM((pull_requests->>'total_created_by_copilot')::int) / NULLIF(SUM((pull_requests->>'total_created')::int), 0), 1) AS value
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days'
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')
```

**PRs Created — Daily (Total vs Copilot)**

```sql
SELECT day AS time, (pull_requests->>'total_created')::int AS "Total Created", (pull_requests->>'total_created_by_copilot')::int AS "Created by Copilot"
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days'
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')
ORDER BY day
```

panels.title: PRs Reviewed (28d)
panels.description: pull_requests.total_reviewed summed over the last 28 days.

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM((pull_requests->>'total_reviewed')::int) AS value FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days' FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')

panels.title: PRs Reviewed by Copilot (28d)
panels.description: pull_requests.total_reviewed_by_copilot summed over the last 28 days.

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM((pull_requests->>'total_reviewed_by_copilot')::int) AS value FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days' FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')

panels.title: % Reviewed by Copilot
panels.description: Share of PR review days where Copilot reviewed (vs total review days). Note: a PR may be reviewed on multiple days.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM((pull_requests->>'total_reviewed_by_copilot')::int) / NULLIF(SUM((pull_requests->>'total_reviewed')::int), 0), 1) AS value FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days' FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')

panels.title: PRs Reviewed — Daily (Total vs Copilot)
panels.description: Daily trend of total PRs reviewed vs PRs reviewed by Copilot.

targets.rawSql: SELECT day AS time, (pull_requests->>'total_reviewed')::int AS "Total Reviewed", (pull_requests->>'total_reviewed_by_copilot')::int AS "Reviewed by Copilot" FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days' FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id') ORDER BY day

options.content:
**API source:** `pull_requests.total_reviewed` and `pull_requests.total_reviewed_by_copilot`.

**Important:** A PR is counted on **every day** it receives a review action (so totals can exceed unique-PR counts). Within a single day each PR is counted at most once.

**Calculation:**
- Stat panels sum each field across the last 28 days.
- Percent gauge: `SUM(total_reviewed_by_copilot) / NULLIF(SUM(total_reviewed), 0) * 100`.

**Why time-series:** Reveals whether Copilot review usage is sustained or sporadic. A flat-line at zero indicates Copilot code review is not enabled or not being requested.

---

### Underlying SQL

**PRs Reviewed (28d)**

```sql
SELECT SUM((pull_requests->>'total_reviewed')::int) AS value
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days'
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')
```

**PRs Reviewed by Copilot (28d)**

```sql
SELECT SUM((pull_requests->>'total_reviewed_by_copilot')::int) AS value
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days'
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')
```

**% Reviewed by Copilot**

```sql
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM((pull_requests->>'total_reviewed_by_copilot')::int) / NULLIF(SUM((pull_requests->>'total_reviewed')::int), 0), 1) AS value
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days'
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')
```

**PRs Reviewed — Daily (Total vs Copilot)**

```sql
SELECT day AS time, (pull_requests->>'total_reviewed')::int AS "Total Reviewed", (pull_requests->>'total_reviewed_by_copilot')::int AS "Reviewed by Copilot"
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days'
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')
ORDER BY day
```

panels.title: Copilot Code Review Engagement (Active vs Passive) — Learning Guide
Monthly Active Code Review Users
panels.description: monthly_active_copilot_code_review_users — users who manually requested a Copilot review or applied a Copilot review suggestion in the 28-day window.

targets.rawSql: SELECT monthly_active_copilot_code_review_users AS value FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND monthly_active_copilot_code_review_users IS NOT NULL ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Monthly Passive Code Review Users
panels.description: monthly_passive_copilot_code_review_users — users who had Copilot auto-assigned to review their PR but did not actively engage.

targets.rawSql: SELECT monthly_passive_copilot_code_review_users AS value FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND monthly_passive_copilot_code_review_users IS NOT NULL ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Active Engagement Rate
panels.description: active / (active + passive) — high values mean developers actively use Copilot reviews; low values mean Copilot is auto-assigning but being ignored.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * monthly_active_copilot_code_review_users / NULLIF(monthly_active_copilot_code_review_users + monthly_passive_copilot_code_review_users, 0), 1) AS value FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND monthly_active_copilot_code_review_users IS NOT NULL AND monthly_passive_copilot_code_review_users IS NOT NULL ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Daily Code Review Users — Active vs Passive
panels.description: Daily trend of active vs passive Copilot code review users.

targets.rawSql: SELECT day AS time, daily_active_copilot_code_review_users AS "Active", daily_passive_copilot_code_review_users AS "Passive" FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days' FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id') ORDER BY day

panels.title: Copilot Code Review Engagement — Learning Guide

options.content:
**API fields (API only — not in built-in dashboard):**
- `daily_active_copilot_code_review_users` / `monthly_active_copilot_code_review_users` — actively engaged (manually requested a review or applied a review suggestion).
- `daily_passive_copilot_code_review_users` / `monthly_passive_copilot_code_review_users` — auto-assigned but did not engage.

**Active Engagement Rate** = `active / (active + passive)`. A high passive count with low active rate is a leading indicator that Copilot reviews are being ignored — a coaching/enablement opportunity.

**Why time-series:** Shows whether engagement is improving as teams adopt the feature, or whether passive auto-assignments are growing without corresponding active use.

---

### Underlying SQL

**Monthly Active Code Review Users**

```sql
SELECT monthly_active_copilot_code_review_users AS value
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND monthly_active_copilot_code_review_users IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 1
```

**Monthly Passive Code Review Users**

```sql
SELECT monthly_passive_copilot_code_review_users AS value
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND monthly_passive_copilot_code_review_users IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 1
```

**Active Engagement Rate**

```sql
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * monthly_active_copilot_code_review_users / NULLIF(monthly_active_copilot_code_review_users + monthly_passive_copilot_code_review_users, 0), 1) AS value
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND monthly_active_copilot_code_review_users IS NOT NULL AND monthly_passive_copilot_code_review_users IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 1
```

**Daily Code Review Users — Active vs Passive**

```sql
SELECT day AS time, daily_active_copilot_code_review_users AS "Active", daily_passive_copilot_code_review_users AS "Passive"
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days'
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')
ORDER BY day
```

panels.title: Pull Request Merge & Lead Time — Learning Guide
PRs Merged (28d)
panels.description: pull_requests.total_merged summed over the last 28 days.

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM((pull_requests->>'total_merged')::int) AS value FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days' FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')

panels.title: PRs Merged that Copilot Created (28d)
panels.description: pull_requests.total_merged_created_by_copilot summed over the last 28 days.

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM((pull_requests->>'total_merged_created_by_copilot')::int) AS value FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days' FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')

panels.title: % Merged that Copilot Created
panels.description: Share of merged PRs that were created by Copilot.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM((pull_requests->>'total_merged_created_by_copilot')::int) / NULLIF(SUM((pull_requests->>'total_merged')::int), 0), 1) AS value FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days' FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')

panels.title: PRs Merged — Daily (Total vs Copilot-Authored)
panels.description: Daily trend of total merged PRs vs Copilot-authored merged PRs.

targets.rawSql: SELECT day AS time, (pull_requests->>'total_merged')::int AS "Total Merged", (pull_requests->>'total_merged_created_by_copilot')::int AS "Copilot-Authored Merged" FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days' FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id') ORDER BY day

panels.title: Median Minutes to Merge — All vs Copilot-Authored
panels.description: Daily median minutes from PR creation to merge — overall vs Copilot-authored. Reveals lead-time drift between human-authored and Copilot-authored PRs.

targets.rawSql: SELECT day AS time, (pull_requests->>'median_minutes_to_merge')::numeric AS "All PRs", (pull_requests->>'median_minutes_to_merge_copilot_authored')::numeric AS "Copilot-Authored" FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days' FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id') ORDER BY day

panels.title: Pull Request Merge & Lead Time — Learning Guide

options.content:
**API source:** `pull_requests.total_merged`, `pull_requests.total_merged_created_by_copilot`, `pull_requests.median_minutes_to_merge`, `pull_requests.median_minutes_to_merge_copilot_authored`.

**Calculation:** Each PR is counted on the day it was merged (one-time event). Median values are *daily medians* reported by GitHub — do not average them across days; chart them as a trend.

**Why two time-series:** The *count* trend shows merge throughput; the *median minutes to merge* trend reveals whether Copilot-authored PRs are getting through review faster or slower than human-authored ones over time. A widening gap is a leading signal worth investigating.

---

### Underlying SQL

**PRs Merged (28d)**

```sql
SELECT SUM((pull_requests->>'total_merged')::int) AS value
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days'
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')
```

**PRs Merged that Copilot Created (28d)**

```sql
SELECT SUM((pull_requests->>'total_merged_created_by_copilot')::int) AS value
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days'
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')
```

**% Merged that Copilot Created**

```sql
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM((pull_requests->>'total_merged_created_by_copilot')::int) / NULLIF(SUM((pull_requests->>'total_merged')::int), 0), 1) AS value
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days'
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')
```

**PRs Merged — Daily (Total vs Copilot-Authored)**

```sql
SELECT day AS time, (pull_requests->>'total_merged')::int AS "Total Merged", (pull_requests->>'total_merged_created_by_copilot')::int AS "Copilot-Authored Merged"
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days'
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')
ORDER BY day
```

**Median Minutes to Merge — All vs Copilot-Authored**

```sql
SELECT day AS time, (pull_requests->>'median_minutes_to_merge')::numeric AS "All PRs", (pull_requests->>'median_minutes_to_merge_copilot_authored')::numeric AS "Copilot-Authored"
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days'
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')
ORDER BY day
```

panels.title: Total PR Review Suggestions (28d)
panels.description: pull_requests.total_suggestions — review suggestions generated by any author.

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM((pull_requests->>'total_suggestions')::int) AS value FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days' FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')

panels.title: Copilot PR Suggestions (28d)
panels.description: pull_requests.total_copilot_suggestions — review suggestions generated by Copilot.

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM((pull_requests->>'total_copilot_suggestions')::int) AS value FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days' FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')

panels.title: % Suggestions from Copilot
panels.description: Share of PR review suggestions generated by Copilot.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM((pull_requests->>'total_copilot_suggestions')::int) / NULLIF(SUM((pull_requests->>'total_suggestions')::int), 0), 1) AS value FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days' FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')

panels.title: PR Review Suggestions — Daily (Total vs Copilot)
panels.description: Daily trend of all review suggestions vs Copilot-generated suggestions.

targets.rawSql: SELECT day AS time, (pull_requests->>'total_suggestions')::int AS "Total", (pull_requests->>'total_copilot_suggestions')::int AS "Copilot" FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days' FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id') ORDER BY day

options.content:
**API source:** `pull_requests.total_suggestions` (any author) and `pull_requests.total_copilot_suggestions` (Copilot only).

**Calculation:** Sums of suggestions generated each day; the percent gauge is `copilot / total`.

**Pair this with the Applied Suggestions section below** — high suggestion volume with a low apply rate suggests the suggestions are noisy or low-quality. High volume + high apply rate is the signal of healthy Copilot review adoption.

---

### Underlying SQL

**Total PR Review Suggestions (28d)**

```sql
SELECT SUM((pull_requests->>'total_suggestions')::int) AS value
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days'
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')
```

**Copilot PR Suggestions (28d)**

```sql
SELECT SUM((pull_requests->>'total_copilot_suggestions')::int) AS value
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days'
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')
```

**% Suggestions from Copilot**

```sql
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM((pull_requests->>'total_copilot_suggestions')::int) / NULLIF(SUM((pull_requests->>'total_suggestions')::int), 0), 1) AS value
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days'
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')
```

**PR Review Suggestions — Daily (Total vs Copilot)**

```sql
SELECT day AS time, (pull_requests->>'total_suggestions')::int AS "Total", (pull_requests->>'total_copilot_suggestions')::int AS "Copilot"
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days'
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')
ORDER BY day
```

panels.title: Applied PR Suggestions (Apply Rate) — Learning Guide
Applied Suggestions — All (28d)
panels.description: pull_requests.total_applied_suggestions — review suggestions applied (any author).

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM((pull_requests->>'total_applied_suggestions')::int) AS value FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days' FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')

panels.title: Applied Copilot Suggestions (28d)
panels.description: pull_requests.total_copilot_applied_suggestions — Copilot-generated suggestions that were applied.

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM((pull_requests->>'total_copilot_applied_suggestions')::int) AS value FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days' FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')

panels.title: Copilot Suggestion Apply Rate
panels.description: applied_copilot / generated_copilot — high values mean reviewers find Copilot's suggestions useful and accept them.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM((pull_requests->>'total_copilot_applied_suggestions')::int) / NULLIF(SUM((pull_requests->>'total_copilot_suggestions')::int), 0), 1) AS value FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days' FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')

panels.title: Copilot Suggestions — Daily (Generated vs Applied)
panels.description: Daily trend of Copilot suggestions generated vs applied. The gap reveals quality and engagement.

targets.rawSql: SELECT day AS time, (pull_requests->>'total_copilot_suggestions')::int AS "Generated", (pull_requests->>'total_copilot_applied_suggestions')::int AS "Applied" FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days' FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id') ORDER BY day

options.content:
**API source:** `pull_requests.total_applied_suggestions` (any author) and `pull_requests.total_copilot_applied_suggestions` (Copilot only).

**Apply Rate:** `total_copilot_applied_suggestions / NULLIF(total_copilot_suggestions, 0) * 100` — the most actionable single number on this dashboard. A low rate (< 10%) suggests Copilot's review feedback is being dismissed; investigate signal quality, model selection, or reviewer workflow.

**Why time-series:** Generated-vs-applied gap over time shows whether reviewer trust in Copilot suggestions is growing, shrinking, or stable.

---

### Underlying SQL

**Applied Suggestions — All (28d)**

```sql
SELECT SUM((pull_requests->>'total_applied_suggestions')::int) AS value
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days'
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')
```

**Applied Copilot Suggestions (28d)**

```sql
SELECT SUM((pull_requests->>'total_copilot_applied_suggestions')::int) AS value
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days'
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')
```

**Copilot Suggestion Apply Rate**

```sql
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM((pull_requests->>'total_copilot_applied_suggestions')::int) / NULLIF(SUM((pull_requests->>'total_copilot_suggestions')::int), 0), 1) AS value
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days'
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')
```

**Copilot Suggestions — Daily (Generated vs Applied)**

```sql
SELECT day AS time, (pull_requests->>'total_copilot_suggestions')::int AS "Generated", (pull_requests->>'total_copilot_applied_suggestions')::int AS "Applied"
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days'
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')
ORDER BY day
```

panels.title: API-Only Adoption Signals (CLI, Suggestions, Interactions) — Learning Guide
Daily Active CLI Users
panels.description: daily_active_cli_users — unique users who used Copilot via the CLI on each day. CLI usage is independent of IDE active-user counts and is API-only.

targets.rawSql: SELECT day AS time, daily_active_cli_users AS "Daily Active CLI Users" FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days' FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id') ORDER BY day

panels.title: Total User-Initiated Interactions
panels.description: user_initiated_interaction_count — daily count of explicit prompts sent to Copilot. Excludes UI events like opening the chat panel or switching modes. API-only.

targets.rawSql: SELECT day AS time, user_initiated_interaction_count AS "User-Initiated Interactions" FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days' FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id') ORDER BY day

panels.title: Lines of Code Suggested — Add vs Delete
panels.description: loc_suggested_to_add_sum and loc_suggested_to_delete_sum — what Copilot proposed vs what was kept (compare with the LoC accepted metrics on the built-in dashboard).

targets.rawSql: SELECT day AS time, loc_suggested_to_add_sum AS "Suggested to Add", loc_suggested_to_delete_sum AS "Suggested to Delete" FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days' FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id') ORDER BY day

options.content:
**Why these are here:** Each of these fields is **API-only** — none appear on the built-in Copilot Usage dashboard at `/orgs/<org>/insights/copilot/usage`.

- `daily_active_cli_users` — CLI surface area is independent of IDE; growth here indicates terminal-driven workflows.
- `user_initiated_interaction_count` — explicit prompts only. Distinct from `code_generation_activity_count` because one prompt can produce multiple generations.
- `loc_suggested_to_add_sum` / `loc_suggested_to_delete_sum` — what Copilot *offered*, not what was kept. Compare with `loc_added_sum` / `loc_deleted_sum` on the built-in dashboard to estimate take-up rate.

---

### Underlying SQL

**Daily Active CLI Users**

```sql
SELECT day AS time, daily_active_cli_users AS "Daily Active CLI Users"
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days'
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')
ORDER BY day
```

**Total User-Initiated Interactions**

```sql
SELECT day AS time, user_initiated_interaction_count AS "User-Initiated Interactions"
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days'
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')
ORDER BY day
```

**Lines of Code Suggested — Add vs Delete**

```sql
SELECT day AS time, loc_suggested_to_add_sum AS "Suggested to Add", loc_suggested_to_delete_sum AS "Suggested to Delete"
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days'
FROM copilot_organization_daily
WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id')
ORDER BY day
```

panels.title: Weekly Active Code Review Users
panels.description: weekly_active_copilot_code_review_users — distinct users who actively engaged with Copilot code review in the last 7 days.

targets.rawSql: SELECT weekly_active_copilot_code_review_users AS value FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND weekly_active_copilot_code_review_users IS NOT NULL ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Weekly Passive Code Review Users
panels.description: weekly_passive_copilot_code_review_users — distinct users who had Copilot auto-assigned to review their PR in the last 7 days but did not engage.

targets.rawSql: SELECT weekly_passive_copilot_code_review_users AS value FROM copilot_organization_daily WHERE organization_id = '$organization_id' AND weekly_passive_copilot_code_review_users IS NOT NULL ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 1
